title: Implement Settings Page & Profile Management

title: Client Detail View + Lightweight CRM

title: SaaS Subscription Gate
history: Extended Stripe webhook for subscription lifecycle events

Exposed subscription state in AuthContext and gated ProtectedRoute
Implemented /subscribe page, billing settings, dashboard trial UI, and i18n
